---
title: "Jubayer Hossain"
subtitle: "Researcher, Educator & Entrepreneur"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website for Jubayer"
image: files/profiles/jubayer.jpg
page-layout: full
toc: false
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:contact.jubayerhossain@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://linkedin.com/hossainmj
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9323-4997
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=9_K4ekoAAAAJ&hl=en&authuser=5
      target: _blank
---

::: {#hero-heading}

![](files/research/interests.svg){width=100% style="max-width:480px; display:block; margin:1.5rem auto;"}

:::

<!-- Newsletter push notification -->
<div id="newsletter-toast" class="newsletter-toast no-print">
<div class="newsletter-toast-header">
<span class="newsletter-toast-title">✉️ &nbsp;Subscribe to my Newsletter</span>
<button class="newsletter-toast-close" onclick="dismissNewsletter()" aria-label="Close">&#x2715;</button>
</div>
<iframe src="https://thehossainlab.substack.com/embed" width="100%" height="220" style="border:none; background:transparent;" frameborder="0" scrolling="no"></iframe>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  if (!localStorage.getItem('newsletter-dismissed')) {
    setTimeout(function() {
      var el = document.getElementById('newsletter-toast');
      if (el) el.classList.add('newsletter-toast-show');
    }, 3000);
  }
})();
function dismissNewsletter() {
  var el = document.getElementById('newsletter-toast');
  if (el) el.classList.remove('newsletter-toast-show');
  localStorage.setItem('newsletter-dismissed', '1');
}
</script>
